review_scope.purpose: bounded review of selected internal radiology evidence summaries
review_scope.aos_role: explainable/verifiable control layer around model outputs
review_scope.kernel_positioning: one domain-agnostic AOS control kernel can support many specialist profiles
review_scope.radiology_instance: Instance 01: AI-assisted brain tumor triage reference profile

public_milestones.publication_boundary: internal/offline evidence milestones only; not clinical validation, production readiness, regulatory compliance, SOTA, or safety certification

shadow_benchmarking.definition: bounded evaluation of model outputs and workflow decisions against AOS control envelopes
shadow_benchmarking.public_scope: synthetic benchmarks, evidence JSON, and public SHA-512 integrity anchor

verified_internal_artifacts.label_mapping: label 2 is SNFH in local dataset metadata
verified_internal_artifacts.publication_boundary: selected small-fold model-output evidence only; not cohort-level performance; not published as Whole Tumor or BraTS 2025 evidence
internal offline cohort report only; not clinical validation, certification, compliance, or production-readiness evidence
internal formal-integrity status only; not Python-to-Lean refinement, segmentation correctness, clinical safety, or production audit proof

not_confirmed_in_public_evidence.claim: Detection rate 92.56 percent as cohort-level radiology metric
not_confirmed_in_public_evidence.status: not confirmed in current public evidence
not confirmed; the n=484 internal report lists ET recall as 0.8065
not available in current public evidence

not_confirmed_in_public_evidence.claim: SOTA or broad comparative radiology performance superiority
not_confirmed_in_public_evidence.status: requires external comparison protocol and independent validation
not established by this public demonstrator

safe_public_summary: Selected internal evidence summaries include promising radiology model-output metrics and a successful formal-integrity build, but this repository does not publish clinical validation, production readiness, regulatory compliance, or SOTA claims.
